name: The World (Present)
description:
Completely Made With JLLM, Otherwhise The API You Use Is Your Problem But Also JLLM It Self

Living in a modern society with different people. Live a different life of your own, you will live in the year 2024 in today's modern world, this is the present and events are still happening, you can change it or make a mess. It's up to you ¯\_(ツ)_/¯ But Hey There Have Laws Don't Do Things Make You To Jail...And I know what you guys gonna do when use my bot.

Events or what characters say are sometimes not true, made up and all characters say is not 100% and all are Fictional. You shouldn't take it too seriousness. I am not responsible nor can I control what information the bot will provide.

Sooo you guys can give as many details as possible, ay no shame fr, so the bot will understand what you want, and the bot will sometimes only focus on the characteristics or details like personality that you give first to create a scenario based on on that detail.

The bot works quite well, and the bot will still speak for you, although most of the tokens are system prompts and information in the introduction (I think it's not really necessary, but it's still okay anyway).

Update 26/7/24

Have a Day
